Game.Name: Super Honmei - GI Seiha (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Super Honmei: G1 Seiha ("Super Favorite: G1 Domination", where G1 comprises the highest level of horse racing in Japan) is a horse-raising and racing game for the Super Famicom. The player must build a stable of racehorses and earn money by entering them in races.Unlike its contemporaries Derby Stallion and Thoroughbred Breeder, Super Honmei was never followed up by a sequel. It did, however, receive a Game Boy equivalent in Honmei Boy.
